goals: Store a preference about communication style when discussing cultural heritage topics
Search for the stored preference to verify it was saved correctly
Review all stored memories to see what has been learned about the user
Delete an outdated memory that no longer reflects current preferences

memories.content: User prefers storytelling approach when discussing cultural heritage

user_agent_config.personality: Warm, articulate, and passionate about inspiring others through cultural storytelling. Values authentic connection and prefers narrative-driven communication.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands memory and preference concepts but does not know technical tool names or internal APIs. Expects the assistant to understand natural references to storing and retrieving personal preferences.

end_condition: The user has successfully stored a preference, verified it through search, reviewed all stored memories, and removed an outdated memory. The memory storage cycle is complete.
